title: Provisional COVID-19 Mortality Surveillance
text:
85% complete within 4 weeks, and 95% complete within 8 weeks of when the death occurred.
Source 
NCHS, National Vital Statistics System. Estimates are based on provisional data.
Suggested Citation 
Ahmad FB, Cisewski JA. Provisional COVID-19 Mortality Surveillance. National Center for Health Statistics. 2026. DOI: https://dx.doi.org/10.15620/cdc/20250305007 
Last Reviewed: January 22, 2026 Source: National Center for Health Statistics
